name: Relate Infotech
message: Accounting Services · United Kingdom · 120 EmployeesRelate Infotech is a subsidiary of Relate Software Development Limited based in Ireland, UK & US. India operations mainly handle Software Product Development, Quality Assurance, Documentation and Support. We also have presence in Malaysia, Singapore, Hongkong and South Africa. Our primary products include CRM, Accounts Production, Taxation, Company Secretary and Business Accounting software.Revenue <$5 Million
